description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CMake Test that runs on push and pull request events for branches devel and release/**, ignoring certain paths. The workflow should cancel in-progress runs if a newer run is started on a given PR, except for devel and release/ branches. Use an ubuntu-22.04 job that checks out the repository with submodules, sets up the environment using a custom action, and runs CMake tests in the ./cmake/test directory using pytest.
